summary: MRI is highly effective at detecting occult post-traumatic lesions such as ligament or meniscus damage due to its superior sensitivity compared to other modalities. It serves well as an alternative to diagnostic arthroscopy because it accurately characterizes these findings non-invasively with high reliability.
